name: Catcher
description: Catch targets, avoid traps, and finish on a branded end screen.

config.label: Stage Width
config.description: Internal game-world width in pixels. The game logic and drawing use this coordinate system.

config.label: Stage Height
config.description: Internal game-world height in pixels.

config.label: Stage Portrait Ratio
config.description: Width divided by height. For `1080 / 1920`, this is a 9:16 portrait layout.

config.label: Stage Background Fill
config.description: Fallback canvas color shown behind the background image, useful when the viewport crops outside the stage.

config.label: Duration
config.description: Total game duration before the game ends.

config.label: Target Score
config.description: Score goal shown as `score/targetScore`. Reaching this score ends the game early.

config.label: Spawn Interval
config.description: Initial delay between falling item spawns.

config.label: Minimum Spawn Interval
config.description: Fastest spawn delay after difficulty ramps up.

config.label: Spawn Ramp Duration
config.description: How long it takes for spawn rate and speed difficulty to reach their maximum ramp.

config.label: Trap Chance
config.description: Probability that a spawned item is a trap. `0.28` means 28%.

config.label: Maximum Active Items
config.description: Maximum number of falling items allowed on screen at once.

config.label: Basket Width
config.description: Basket render width in game-world pixels.

config.label: Basket Height
config.description: Basket render height.

config.label: Basket Bottom Offset
config.description: Distance from the bottom of the stage to the bottom area positioning the basket.

config.label: Basket Collision Inset X
config.description: Shrinks the basket collision box from left and right, so catches feel closer to the visible basket shape.

config.label: Basket Collision Inset Top
config.description: Moves the basket collision area downward from the top.

config.label: Basket Collision Inset Bottom
config.description: Shrinks the collision area from the bottom.

config.label: Basket Follow Lerp
config.description: How quickly the basket follows pointer movement. Higher values feel snappier; lower values feel smoother.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Enabled
config.description: Whether the hand tutorial appears before the first basket touch.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Width
config.description: Hand render width in game-world pixels.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Height
config.description: Hand render height in game-world pixels.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Y Offset
config.description: Hand Y offset from the basket center in game-world pixels.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Move Distance
config.description: Horizontal motion distance around the basket center in game-world pixels.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Bob Distance
config.description: Vertical bob distance in game-world pixels.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Cycle Duration (ms)
config.description: Duration of one tutorial motion cycle in milliseconds.

config.label: Tutorial Hand Opacity
config.description: Hand opacity.

config.label: Feedback Duration (ms)
config.description: How long the catch feedback stays visible in milliseconds.

config.label: Feedback Text Size
config.description: Text size for +1/-1 feedback in game-world pixels.

config.label: Feedback Text Rise
config.description: How far the +1/-1 text floats upward during the effect.

config.label: Target Feedback Text Color
config.description: Target catch text color.

config.label: Trap Feedback Text Color
config.description: Bomb catch text color.

config.label: Target Glow Color
config.description: Target catch basket glow color.

config.label: Trap Glow Color
config.description: Bomb catch basket glow color.

config.label: Feedback Glow Blur
config.description: Outer glow blur around the basket.

config.label: Feedback Ripple Radius
config.description: Ripple circle size at the center of the basket.

config.label: Feedback Sparkle Count
config.description: Number of sparkles shown around the basket for a target catch.

config.label: Item Size
config.description: Render size of targets and traps.

config.label: Minimum Fall Speed
config.description: Minimum falling speed.

config.label: Maximum Fall Speed
config.description: Maximum falling speed.

config.label: Speed Ramp
config.description: Extra speed added as difficulty ramps up.

config.label: Spawn Top Offset
config.description: Starting Y position above the visible stage.

config.label: Horizontal Padding
config.description: Keeps spawned items away from the left and right edges.

config.label: Spawn Rotation Angle
config.description: Maximum random starting rotation in degrees. `0` means items spawn upright.

config.label: Minimum Rotation Speed
config.description: Slowest counter-clockwise rotation speed.

config.label: Maximum Rotation Speed
config.description: Fastest clockwise rotation speed.

config.label: Soundtrack Volume
config.description: Background music volume multiplier.

config.label: Effect Volume
config.description: Catch sound effect volume multiplier.

config.label: Low Time Warning Seconds
config.description: When remaining time is at or below this value, the timer HUD switches to warning color.

config.label: HUD Top
config.description: Top offset from the safe-area top in CSS pixels.

config.label: HUD Width (vw)
config.description: HUD width as a percentage of viewport width.

config.label: HUD Max Width
config.description: Maximum HUD width in CSS pixels.

config.label: HUD Gap
config.description: Gap between timer and progress bar in CSS pixels.

config.label: HUD Timer Font Size
config.description: Timer text size in CSS pixels.

config.label: HUD Timer Color
config.description: Timer text color.

config.label: HUD Timer Warning Color
config.description: Timer warning color when time is low.

config.label: Progress Bar Height
config.description: Progress bar height in CSS pixels.

config.label: Progress Bar Border Width
config.description: Progress bar border width in CSS pixels.

config.label: Progress Bar Border Color
config.description: Progress bar border color.

config.label: Progress Bar Background Color
config.description: Progress bar background color.

config.label: Progress Bar Fill Color
config.description: Progress bar fill color.

config.label: Progress Label Font Size
config.description: Progress label text size in CSS pixels.

config.label: Progress Label Text Color
config.description: Progress label text color.

config.label: End Button Text
config.description: Text shown on the end screen CTA button.

config.label: End Button Width
config.description: Button width in CSS pixels.

config.label: End Button Height
config.description: Button height in CSS pixels.

config.label: End Button Font Size
config.description: Button text size in CSS pixels.

config.label: End Button Center Y Percent
config.description: Button center Y position as a percentage of screen height.

config.label: End Button Color
config.description: Button background color.

config.label: End Button Text Color
config.description: Button text color.

config.label: End Button Pulse Scale
config.description: Largest scale used by the repeating big-small button effect.

config.label: End Button Pulse Duration (ms)
config.description: Duration of one big-small animation cycle in milliseconds.
